title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
